solution_code:
def count_valid(items):
    """Return the number of valid feed items.

    A feed item is valid when it has a non-empty title and url.
    """
    count = 0
    for item in items:
        title = item.get('title', '') if isinstance(item, dict) else getattr(item, 'title', '')
        url = item.get('url', '') if isinstance(item, dict) else getattr(item, 'url', '')
        if title and url:
            count += 1
    return count

    count = 0

        url = item.get('url', '')
        if title and url:
            count += 1
    return count

"""Feed item validation module."""


def count_valid(items):
    """Return the number of valid feed items.

    A feed item is valid when it has a non-empty title and url.
    """
    count = 0
    for item in items:
        title = item.get("title", "")
        url = item.get("url", "")
        if title and url:
            count += 1
    return count
